reason: Backend pre-development checklist and service-boundary rules for Parser work.
Required quality checks, forbidden patterns, and test expectations.
Ensure Parser smoke docs do not change public or internal API semantics.
Shape diagnostic failure messages without leaking internals.
Avoid sensitive data in diagnostics or docs.
Shared thinking and commit guidance for implementation.
Python/PaddleOCR runtime baseline and dependency constraints.
Env-gated smoke and PR verification expectations.
